issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases for missing data or invalid inputs.
The skill contains verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: SaaS welcome sequence with exit conditions and branching
scenarios.rationale: Treatment followed the welcome-sequence blueprint (5-7 emails over 12-14 days), included exit conditions, branching for active vs inactive users at email 4-5, and per-email Subject/Preview/Body/CTA output format; baseline produced a generic schedule without exit conditions, branching, or the documented output structure.

scenarios.name: B2B lead nurture after whitepaper download
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used the 6-8 email nurture blueprint with deliver/expand/problem/solution/case-study/differentiation/objection/offer arc, one CTA per email, and the documented Sequence Overview format; baseline gave a 3-email blast with multiple CTAs and no objection-handler or differentiation step.
